description: Vehicle ahead stopped suddenly in moving traffic. Unable to react in time, the insured vehicle hit the rear of the vehicle, resulting in moderate front-side damage.
A vehicle lost control while traveling at speed, overturned, and landed on my vehicle. The force of the impact caused damage to multiple areas and affected several exterior components.
A wrong-side vehicle entered the lane unexpectedly and collided with the car. The impact led to major damage and affected several parts of the vehicle.
A vehicle ahead stopped suddenly on the road. While trying to avoid hitting it, I have swerved and ended up crashing into a tree.
